description: Nubuck and leather trail-walking or hiking shoe from a brand known for its hardy, practical appeal. This woodland shoe states 'Explore More' on the side which captures the idea of this shoe perfectly - wear this and get out into the wild! Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, shorts or washed denims and a checked casual shirt ready for an outdoors adventure. UpperNubuck upper with leather overlays, printed design on the leatherRubber-reinforced toe guard to protect your feet when on rough terrainCentral lace ups with grip-lock eyelet to hold laces firmOutsole reinforced onto the upper on the heel region with brandingBrand tag on outer sideHaul loop to help you pull the shoe on or off, and to use to hang the shoe from a rucksackPadded tongue and collar lined with leatherPadded insole for in-step comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with heavy duty lugsShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
